homepage.heroSubline: Reliable home repairs and maintenance, done right. Serving Philadelphia and surrounding communities with expertise and care.
aboutText: Complete Home Repairs & Maintenance LLC started with a simple goal: to provide honest, reliable handyman services to our Philadelphia neighbors. We understand the unique challenges of maintaining homes in this historic city, from aging rowhouses to modern condos.

We believe in clear communication, fair pricing, and quality workmanship. Our team treats every home as if it were our own, ensuring every project is completed to the highest standards of safety and satisfaction. We listen carefully to your needs and provide customized solutions.

We're proud to be a part of the Philadelphia community. We actively support local initiatives and strive to give back whenever possible. When you choose us, you're supporting a local business that cares about its neighbors.

valueProps.title: Reliable Service
valueProps.description: Count on us for punctual and professional service, every time.

valueProps.title: Experienced Team
valueProps.description: Our skilled handymen have years of experience tackling a wide range of home repairs.

valueProps.title: Transparent Pricing
valueProps.description: We provide upfront, honest pricing with no hidden fees.

valueProps.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
valueProps.description: We're not happy until you are. We stand behind our work and ensure your complete satisfaction.

homepage.ctaSubline: Let us help you keep your home in top shape. Contact us for a free, no-obligation estimate.

services.name: Drywall Repair
services.shortDescription: Seamless drywall repairs to restore your walls to their original condition.
services.description:
From small dings and dents to larger holes caused by water damage or accidents, Complete Home Repairs & Maintenance LLC offers comprehensive drywall repair services throughout Philadelphia. We understand the importance of a smooth, flawless finish, especially in older homes where imperfections are easily noticeable.

Our process begins with a thorough assessment of the damage to determine the best course of action. We carefully remove any loose or damaged drywall, reinforce the area, and apply new drywall compound in multiple thin layers for a seamless blend. We then sand the area smooth and prepare it for painting or wallpapering.

We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure a durable and long-lasting repair. Whether your drywall is damaged by moisture, impact, or settling, we have the expertise to restore it to its original condition. We also offer painting services to match the existing color and texture of your walls.

Benefits of our drywall repair services include improved aesthetics, prevention of further damage, and increased property value. Don't let unsightly drywall damage detract from the beauty and comfort of your home. Contact us today for a free estimate.
process: Step 1: Assess the damage and provide a detailed estimate.
Step 2: Prepare the area by removing loose or damaged drywall.
Step 3: Apply drywall compound in thin layers, allowing for proper drying time.
Step 4: Sand the area smooth and prepare for painting or wallpapering.
benefits: Seamless repairs for a flawless finish
Prevention of further damage from moisture or pests
Improved aesthetics and increased property value
Expert color matching for a consistent look

faq.question: How long does drywall repair typically take?
faq.answer: The duration of drywall repair depends on the size and severity of the damage. Small repairs can often be completed in a few hours, while larger projects may take a day or two.

faq.question: Do you offer painting services after drywall repair?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer complete painting services to match the existing color and texture of your walls. Our experienced painters will ensure a seamless finish.

faq.question: What types of drywall damage can you repair?
faq.answer: We can repair a wide range of drywall damage, including holes, cracks, dents, water damage, and nail pops. We have the expertise to handle any drywall repair project.

services.name: Painting Services
services.shortDescription: Interior & exterior painting to refresh your home's look and protect it from the elements.
services.description:
Complete Home Repairs & Maintenance LLC provides professional painting services for both interior and exterior surfaces in Philadelphia. We understand that a fresh coat of paint can transform the look and feel of your home, while also providing essential protection against the elements, especially important for Philadelphia's weather extremes.

Our interior painting services include surface preparation, priming, painting walls, ceilings, trim, and doors. We use high-quality paints and materials to ensure a durable and long-lasting finish. We take the time to properly protect your furniture and flooring, and we thoroughly clean up after each project.

Our exterior painting services include power washing, scraping, priming, and painting siding, trim, doors, and windows. We use weather-resistant paints that are designed to withstand the harsh Philadelphia climate, including hot summers, cold winters, and frequent rain and snow. We also take into account the unique challenges of painting historic brick rowhouses and other older homes.

We offer a wide range of color options and can help you choose the perfect colors to complement your home's style and architecture. Our experienced painters pay close attention to detail and strive for perfection on every project. Whether you're looking to update your interior or protect your exterior, we have the expertise to get the job done right.
process: Step 1: Thorough surface preparation, including cleaning, sanding, and priming.
Step 2: Application of high-quality paint in multiple coats for a durable finish.
Step 3: Careful attention to detail on trim, doors, and windows.
Step 4: Complete cleanup and disposal of all materials.
benefits: Enhanced curb appeal and property value
Protection against the elements
Improved interior aesthetics
Increased comfort and enjoyment of your home

faq.question: How long does a typical painting project take?
faq.answer: The duration of a painting project depends on the size and complexity of the job. Interior painting projects typically take a few days, while exterior projects may take a week or more.

faq.question: Do you offer color consultations?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer color consultations to help you choose the perfect colors for your home. We can provide expert advice on color schemes and trends.

faq.question: What type of paint do you use?
faq.answer: We use high-quality paints from leading brands that are designed for durability and long-lasting performance. We can also recommend specific paints for different applications, such as moisture-resistant paints for bathrooms and kitchens.

services.name: Plumbing Repairs
services.shortDescription: Fixing leaks, clogs, and other plumbing issues to keep your water flowing smoothly.
services.description:
Complete Home Repairs & Maintenance LLC provides comprehensive plumbing repair services to homeowners in Philadelphia. We understand that plumbing problems can be disruptive and cause significant damage if left unaddressed, especially in older row homes in areas like Fishtown and Northern Liberties.

Our experienced plumbers can handle a wide range of plumbing issues, including leaky faucets, clogged drains, running toilets, burst pipes, and water heater repairs. We use the latest tools and techniques to diagnose and repair plumbing problems quickly and efficiently.

We also offer preventative maintenance services to help you avoid costly plumbing repairs in the future. This includes inspecting your plumbing system for leaks, corrosion, and other potential problems. We can also provide advice on how to conserve water and reduce your water bill.

We understand that plumbing emergencies can happen at any time, which is why we offer 24/7 emergency plumbing services. Whether you have a burst pipe in the middle of the night or a clogged drain on a weekend, we're always available to help. We are familiar with the plumbing infrastructure common in Philadelphia, including the older systems in historic neighborhoods.
process: Step 1: Diagnose the plumbing problem and provide a detailed estimate.
Step 2: Repair or replace damaged pipes, fixtures, and appliances.
Step 3: Test the plumbing system to ensure proper function.
Step 4: Clean up the work area and dispose of all materials.
benefits: Prevention of water damage and mold growth
Improved water efficiency and reduced water bills
Increased comfort and convenience
Peace of mind knowing your plumbing system is in good working order

faq.question: How do I know if I have a plumbing leak?
faq.answer: Signs of a plumbing leak include water stains on walls or ceilings, a musty odor, and a sudden increase in your water bill. If you suspect a leak, it's important to call a plumber as soon as possible.

faq.question: What should I do if I have a burst pipe?
faq.answer: If you have a burst pipe, the first thing you should do is shut off the water supply to your home. Then, call a plumber immediately. It's important to act quickly to prevent water damage.

faq.question: How often should I have my plumbing system inspected?
faq.answer: We recommend having your plumbing system inspected at least once a year to catch any potential problems early. Regular maintenance can help you avoid costly repairs in the future.

services.name: Electrical Repairs
services.shortDescription: Safe and reliable electrical repairs for lighting, outlets, wiring, and more.
services.description:
Complete Home Repairs & Maintenance LLC provides safe and reliable electrical repair services to homeowners in Philadelphia. We understand that electrical problems can be dangerous and should only be handled by qualified professionals, especially given the older wiring systems in many Philadelphia homes.

Our licensed electricians can handle a wide range of electrical repairs, including faulty wiring, broken outlets, flickering lights, and circuit breaker problems. We use the latest tools and techniques to diagnose and repair electrical problems quickly and safely.

We also offer electrical safety inspections to help you identify potential hazards in your home. This includes checking your wiring, outlets, and circuit breakers for any signs of damage or wear. We can also provide advice on how to improve the energy efficiency of your home.

We understand that electrical emergencies can happen at any time, which is why we offer 24/7 emergency electrical services. Whether you have a power outage in the middle of the night or a sparking outlet on a weekend, we're always available to help.
process: Step 1: Diagnose the electrical problem and provide a detailed estimate.
Step 2: Repair or replace damaged wiring, outlets, and fixtures.
Step 3: Test the electrical system to ensure proper function.
Step 4: Clean up the work area and dispose of all materials.
benefits: Improved safety and protection against electrical hazards
Increased energy efficiency and reduced energy bills
Enhanced comfort and convenience
Peace of mind knowing your electrical system is in good working order

faq.question: How do I know if I have an electrical problem?
faq.answer: Signs of an electrical problem include flickering lights, sparking outlets, and a burning smell. If you notice any of these signs, it's important to call an electrician as soon as possible.

faq.question: What should I do if I have a power outage?
faq.answer: If you have a power outage, the first thing you should do is check your circuit breaker. If the breaker has tripped, reset it. If the power outage persists, call your local utility company.

faq.question: How often should I have my electrical system inspected?
faq.answer: We recommend having your electrical system inspected at least every three to five years to catch any potential problems early. Regular maintenance can help you avoid costly repairs in the future.

services.name: Carpentry Services
services.shortDescription: Custom carpentry work for trim, doors, windows, and more to enhance your home's beauty.
services.description:
Complete Home Repairs & Maintenance LLC offers a wide range of carpentry services to homeowners in Philadelphia. From custom trim work to door and window installations, we can help you enhance the beauty and functionality of your home, paying close attention to the architectural details common in Philadelphia's diverse housing styles.

Our experienced carpenters can handle a variety of carpentry projects, including installing crown molding, baseboards, and wainscoting. We can also build custom shelves, cabinets, and other storage solutions to help you maximize your space. We are skilled in working with various materials, including wood, composite, and PVC.

We understand the importance of quality craftsmanship and attention to detail. We take the time to properly prepare each project and use the best materials to ensure a long-lasting and beautiful result. We also offer painting and staining services to complete your carpentry project.

Whether you're looking to add a touch of elegance to your home or improve its functionality, we have the expertise to get the job done right. We are familiar with the unique carpentry needs of Philadelphia's row homes and Victorian-era houses.
process: Step 1: Discuss your carpentry needs and provide a detailed estimate.
Step 2: Prepare the project area and gather the necessary materials.
Step 3: Perform the carpentry work with precision and attention to detail.
Step 4: Clean up the work area and dispose of all materials.
benefits: Enhanced aesthetics and increased property value
Improved functionality and organization
Customized solutions to meet your specific needs
Quality craftsmanship and long-lasting results

faq.question: What types of carpentry projects do you handle?
faq.answer: We handle a wide range of carpentry projects, including trim work, door and window installations, custom shelving, cabinet building, and more. We can also handle repairs to existing carpentry work.

faq.question: Do you offer design services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer design services to help you visualize your carpentry project. We can provide drawings and renderings to show you how your project will look when it's completed.

faq.question: What type of wood do you use?
faq.answer: We use a variety of wood types, depending on the project requirements and your preferences. We can recommend the best type of wood for your specific project.

services.name: Gutter Cleaning
services.shortDescription: Keeping your gutters clean and free of debris to protect your home from water damage.
services.description:
Complete Home Repairs & Maintenance LLC provides professional gutter cleaning services to homeowners in Philadelphia. We understand the importance of clean and properly functioning gutters, especially with Philadelphia's frequent rainfall and seasonal leaf drop, which can quickly clog gutters and lead to water damage.

Our experienced team will remove all leaves, twigs, and other debris from your gutters and downspouts. We will also inspect your gutters for any signs of damage or wear. If we find any problems, we will recommend the necessary repairs.

We use safe and effective techniques to clean your gutters, including ladders and extension poles. We also take care to protect your landscaping from damage.

Regular gutter cleaning is essential to prevent water damage to your roof, siding, and foundation. Clogged gutters can cause water to overflow and seep into your home, leading to mold growth and other problems. Don't wait until water damage occurs – contact us today to schedule your gutter cleaning service.
process: Step 1: Inspect the gutters for debris and damage.
Step 2: Remove all leaves, twigs, and other debris from the gutters and downspouts.
Step 3: Flush the gutters with water to ensure proper flow.
Step 4: Dispose of the debris properly.
benefits: Prevention of water damage to your roof, siding, and foundation
Protection against mold growth
Improved drainage and reduced risk of flooding
Extended lifespan of your gutters

faq.question: How often should I have my gutters cleaned?
faq.answer: We recommend having your gutters cleaned at least twice a year, in the spring and fall. If you live in an area with a lot of trees, you may need to have them cleaned more often.

faq.question: Can I clean my gutters myself?
faq.answer: While it is possible to clean your gutters yourself, it can be dangerous. We recommend hiring a professional gutter cleaning service to ensure the job is done safely and effectively.

faq.question: Do you offer gutter repair services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer gutter repair services. We can repair or replace damaged gutters and downspouts.

From minor repairs to major renovations, our skilled team is equipped to handle any project, big or small. reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: I had a hole in my drywall from a leaky pipe, and Complete Home Repairs & Maintenance LLC fixed it perfectly. You can't even tell there was ever a hole there! They were professional, on time, and very reasonably priced. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: We hired Complete Home Repairs & Maintenance LLC to paint the exterior of our row home in South Philly. They did a great job prepping the surfaces and the paint looks fantastic. There were some minor delays due to weather, but they communicated with us throughout the process.

reviews.name: Jessica L.
reviews.text: I had a clogged drain in my bathroom sink, and Complete Home Repairs & Maintenance LLC was able to come out the same day and fix it. The plumber was very knowledgeable and friendly, and he explained everything he was doing. Great service!

reviews.name: Michael B.
reviews.text: Complete Home Repairs & Maintenance LLC installed new lighting fixtures in my kitchen. The electrician was professional, efficient, and very careful. The new lights look amazing, and I'm very happy with the quality of the work.

reviews.name: Emily R.
reviews.text: I hired Complete Home Repairs & Maintenance LLC to build custom shelves in my living room. The shelves look great, and they were exactly what I wanted. The only reason I'm not giving them 5 stars is that the project took a little longer than expected.

reviews.name: Tom S.
reviews.text: I was having issues with water overflowing my gutters during heavy rains. Complete Home Repairs & Maintenance LLC came out and cleaned them thoroughly. They even pointed out a few spots that needed repair. Great job!
